aggregatorExplanation: This feature allows you to automatically fetch the events added to the agendas of your choice.
sourcesExplanation: The events published by the agendas listed here are automatically added to the [%title%](%link%) agenda.
addSources: To aggregate new agendas, [go to the page of the agenda](%searchLink%) you wish to add and click on Export > Aggregate in > **%agenda%**
sourcesHelp: Click here to find out more about aggregations
aggregationLoop: This agenda aggregates events from the agenda you want to add it to. Agregation loops are not permitted.
removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this agenda from sources ?
sourceAdded: %source% was added to the sources of %agg%. Its upcoming events will be added shortly.
sourceRemoved: %source% was removed from the sources of %agg%.
